General.Name: Cirtek Holdings Ltd
General.Description: Cirtek Holdings Limited, an investment holding company, manufactures and sells printing products in Mainland China, Hong Kong, Bangladesh, India, Vietnam, and internationally. The company offers apparel labels and trim products, such as hang tags, woven and printed labels, and heat transfer products. It also provides customer services; and engages in product sourcing activities. The company was founded in 1991 and is based in Lai Chi Kok, Hong Kong. Cirtek Holdings Limited is a subsidiary of Charming International Limited.
General.Address: Wing Ming Industrial Centre, Lai Chi Kok, Hong Kong
